preferences.region_empty: No dedicated region preference exists yet. This can be inferred after you build a trip plan.
preferences.region_hint: Based on areas in your current planner draft.
preferences.style_empty: No stored travel style exists yet. It will stay read-only until account preferences are connected.
preferences.style_hint: Inferred from your current planner categories.
preferences.interests_saved: Derived from the place categories in your saved_items list.
preferences.interests_plan: Fallback signal from your current planner draft.
preferences.interests_empty: Save places or build a plan to surface interest signals here.
preferences.language_hint: This follows the existing app language picker and kello_lang value.
preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.desc: Language uses an actual stored value. The other rows stay read-only and only reflect planner or saved-item signals when they exist.

verification.email_ready: Confirmed in your current auth session.
verification.email_missing: Email confirmation was not detected from Supabase auth.
verification.phone_ready: Phone verification is available on this account.
verification.phone_partial: A phone value exists, but verification was not detected.
verification.phone_empty: Phone verification is not connected yet in this build.
verification.provider_hint: Read from the active Supabase auth session.
verification.title: Verification / Safety
verification.desc: Only verification signals that already exist in the current auth session are shown here.

links.support_desc: Open booking help, emergency support, and FAQs.
links.phrases_desc: Keep useful Korean phrases ready for on-the-go help.
links.saved_desc: Review saved places, your current plan, and recent items.
links.bookings_desc: Check upcoming reservations and related support flows.
links.community_desc: Revisit your posts, reviews, and meetup activity.
links.title: App Settings / Quick Links
links.desc: These are the existing pages you can already manage or revisit from the current app.
links.placeholder_desc: Dedicated notification and privacy controls are not wired in this build yet, so they remain read-only placeholders here.

partner.title: Partner Status
partner.approved_desc: Your partner application is approved. Ongoing partner requests can continue through support for now.
partner.pending_desc: Your partner request is under review. There is no separate partner center route in this build yet.
partner.rejected_desc: The previous application was not approved. You can submit the partner signup flow again when details are ready.
partner.none_desc: You are browsing as a traveler account. Apply only if you want to onboard a business or service.

admin.enabled_desc: This account can access the admin console and review partner requests.
admin.disabled_desc: Admin access is not enabled on this profile.
admin.title: Admin Console
admin.source_none: No admin flag on this profile

account.sign_in_title: Sign in to manage account details
account.sign_in_desc: This hub can only read verified account and profile fields from the active Supabase session.
account.title: Account / Profile
account.desc: These fields come from your current auth user, profile nickname, and basic account metadata.
account.display_name_hint: Nickname is preferred, then auth metadata, then your email name.
account.email_hint: Read from the active Supabase auth user.
account.joined_hint: Uses the profile created_at value when available, then falls back to auth created_at.
account.read_only: Profile editing is not connected yet in this build. Use support if an account detail needs manual help.

partner_admin.title: Partner / Admin
partner_admin.desc: Partner and admin access reuse the same partner status and profile admin checks that already exist on the my dashboard.

support.title: My Support

booking.label: Booking Help
booking.desc: Recent reservations, issue reporting, and next-step help.

general.label: General Help
general.desc: Help Center, support paths, and community safety entry points.

emergency.label: Emergency & Interpreter
emergency.desc: Use this hub first, then open the medical, police, or interpreter detail page that fits the situation.

find_booking.q: I cannot find my booking place.
find_booking.a: Check the map and area shown on your booking first. If you still cannot locate it, open Translation Help or the Help Center for local assistance.

staff_talk.q: It is hard to talk with staff.
staff_talk.a: Use Interpreter Help for quick translation tools and hotline access. If the situation feels urgent, move to Emergency Help right away.

change_time.q: I want to change my booking time.
change_time.a: Direct booking changes are not available in the app yet. Start from Booking Help so you can choose the safest next step before heading to the venue.

cancel_refund.q: Where do I cancel or ask about refunds?
cancel_refund.a: In-app cancellation and refund handling are not available yet. Use Help Center or Booking Help to confirm what support path is available for your case.

write_review.q: How do I write a review after my visit?
write_review.a: Completed bookings can send you to My Community > Reviews. If a dedicated review form is not ready yet, use the existing Community composer.

community_safety.q: A meetup or community situation feels unsafe.
community_safety.a: Stop sharing personal details and move to police or emergency help first if needed. Community-specific report handling is limited right now, so use the safety route that fits the situation.

help_center.label: Help Center
help_center.desc: Open the detailed help pages for medical, police, interpreter, lost item, and emergency contacts already available in the app.

booking_cancel.label: Booking & cancellation help
booking_cancel.desc: Use this first for time changes, availability questions, and issue-report guidance.

community_safety.label: Community safety
community_safety.desc: For unsafe meetups or uncomfortable situations, move to the safety route first.

partner.label: Partner inquiry
partner.desc: Business and partner-related onboarding can continue from the partner signup flow.

general.title: General Help
general.desc: Use these entry points when you are not sure where to go next.
general.report_notice: Direct issue tickets are not available yet. Use the help paths below for your booking question.

overview.label: Emergency Support
overview.desc: Open the main emergency help page for medical, police, lost item, and interpreter access.

interp.label: Interpreter Help
interp.desc: Use translation tools and hotline links when speaking with venue staff is difficult.
interp.booking_desc: Carry this booking context into the interpreter route so staff can understand which reservation you mean.

phrases.label: Emergency Phrases
phrases.desc: Open large Korean phrases you can show directly to nearby staff, drivers, or help desks.
phrases.booking_desc: Open booking phrases first when you need to explain the reservation, delay, or check-in situation to staff.

medical.label: Medical Help
medical.desc: Need clinic or emergency medical support? Open the medical help path directly.

police.label: Police / Safety Help
police.desc: Use the safety route for police contact, incident guidance, or a risky situation.

emergency.title: Emergency / Interpreter Help
emergency.desc: My Support is the hub. Use the detailed help pages below when the situation is urgent or communication is difficult.
emergency.interpreter_notice: Interpreter links are available below. Some options may open a call screen or an external translation page.
emergency.hub_notice: Use this hub to choose the right detailed page. /help/* pages explain one route in more depth, and Travel Phrasebook is for showable Korean text.

booking.banner_report: Reporting an issue for {{bookingName}}. Choose the support route that matches the problem.
booking.banner_interpreter: Need language help for {{bookingName}}? Interpreter and emergency links are ready below.
booking.banner_default: Need help with {{bookingName}}? Start with the booking card below.
booking.banner_fallback: Need help with a booking? Start with the closest reservation below.
booking.title: Booking Help
booking.desc: Use your recent bookings as the fastest way to find the right support path.

empty.title: There is no booking to ask about right now.
empty.desc: Check My Bookings again later or explore places to start planning your trip.

booking.context_desc: Keep this reservation context visible while you move between booking help, interpreter help, and phrases.

support.subtitle: Find the right help path for bookings, questions, and urgent travel situations.

faq.title: FAQ / Quick Guide
faq.desc: Short, safe guidance for common travel questions inside the current app scope.

phrases.title: Travel Phrasebook

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.desc: Save the phrases you expect to show most often during your trip.
favorites.empty: Save a few frequent phrases so they stay easy to reopen.

recent.title: Recent
recent.desc: Recently opened or copied phrases stay here for quick access.

phrases.subtitle: Show these phrases to staff, drivers, or shop teams in Korea when you need a fast answer on the spot.

context.title: Current context
context.interpreter: Emergency phrases are ready if you need to explain a situation quickly.
context.support: Use this phrasebook with the support hub when speaking with local staff is difficult.
context.booking: Booking phrases are ready for this reservation.

booking.label: Booking
booking.description: Reservation check-in, delays, and option requests.
booking.helper: Best for front desks, tour desks, and venue staff.

transport.label: Transport
transport.description: Taxi, station, and route support for moving around Korea.
transport.helper: Useful for drivers, station staff, and route questions.

restaurant.label: Restaurant
restaurant.description: Ordering help, allergy notes, and menu questions.
restaurant.helper: Show these before ordering when timing is tight.

beauty.label: Beauty
beauty.description: Salon, spa, and treatment requests in simple Korean.
beauty.helper: Helpful for consultations and price checks before treatment.

emergency.label: Emergency
emergency.description: Urgent help phrases and interpreter-related requests.
emergency.helper: Use with nearby staff, help desks, or emergency support lines.

empty.title: No phrases available right now.
empty.desc: Try another category or use Support if you need help right away.

saved.title: My Saved
saved.dashboard_desc: Jump back to saved places, planner drafts, and recent items from one hub.

places.added: Added to your planner. You can adjust the time in Planner.
places.title: Saved Places
places.desc: Reopen the places you bookmarked from Explore. When a saved id has limited metadata, this hub shows a minimal fallback card instead of guessing extra details.

empty.title: No saved places yet.
empty.desc: Popular places you save in Explore will be collected here for quick planning later.

plans.synced: Based on your current planner draft
plans.title: Saved Plans
plans.desc: This tab reflects your current planner draft. It does not create separate saved templates or server-side plan records.

empty.title: No saved plans yet.
empty.desc: Start building your itinerary in Planner and your current draft will appear here.

saved.subtitle: Find the places, planner drafts, and recently viewed items you want to revisit later.
saved.summary_hint: Places come from your saved explore item ids, plans come from your current planner draft, and recent items stay on this device.

recent.title: Recent
recent.desc: Recently viewed places, plans, and community posts stay here on this device for quick return visits.

empty.title: No recent items yet.
empty.desc: Recent items will show up here after you open a place, planner, or community detail page.
empty.fallback: Recent items will be kept here on this device when local storage is available.

community_hub.title: My Community
community_hub.subtitle: Track what you posted, reviewed, and planned with the community in one place.

reviews.title: You have not written any reviews yet.
reviews.desc: Start with a completed booking and share what helped your trip.
reviews.no_completed: Finish a booking first, then come back here to leave a helpful review.

meetups.title: No meetup activity yet.
meetups.desc: Browse meetup-style community posts and keep your next plan here.

posts.title: No posts saved in your hub yet.
posts.desc: Browse the community, ask a question, or leave a helpful tip for other travelers.

community_hub.summary_hint: Counts are based on your authored community posts and your completed bookings.
community_hub.sync_error: Community posts could not be refreshed right now. Empty states are shown as a fallback.

review_prompts.title: Write from your completed bookings
review_prompts.desc: Open Community to write a review and choose the Review type in the existing composer.

community_hub.posts_desc: General community posts you created, ready to revisit or manage.
community_hub.reviews_desc: Review posts you already published, plus a quick path back to booking history.
community_hub.meetups_desc: Meetup-style activity from your community posts, including travel mate plans.

upcoming.title: No upcoming bookings
upcoming.desc: Explore top-rated spots and start planning your next stop.

completed.title: No completed bookings yet
completed.desc: Places you finish will be saved here, ready for a review.

other.title: No other records
other.desc: Cancelled or unavailable requests will appear here.

dashboard.saved_recent_desc: Jump back to saved places, planner drafts, and recent items from one hub.

partner.none_desc: Join Kello as a partner and introduce your service to more travelers.
partner.pending_desc: Your request is under review. We will update you after the admin check.

hero.title: Beauty booking reviews come first here
hero.subtitle: Start with salon visit reviews, then continue into food, sightseeing, and event follow-ups.
hero.search_placeholder: Search salon names, treatment experiences, or booking reviews

banner.title: kello Beauty Review Board ✨
banner.body: Check real post-booking salon experiences first and compare service quality, satisfaction, and revisit intent.
banner.secondary_body: Browse reviews for places you may want to visit together and line up plans.

nav_summary.all: You are viewing every story in {{tab}}.
nav_summary.active_reactions: These {{tab}} posts are getting the hottest reactions.
nav_summary.open_meetup: These {{tab}} posts are open for going together.
nav_summary.weekend: Check {{tab}} ideas that fit this weekend.

mine_result.desc: Have you visited already? Leave a short tip for the next person.

mine_active.desc: A lot of people are paying attention to your post. Take a look.

reacted_survey.desc: People are coordinating opinions. Share a day or time that works for you.

saved_result.desc: A saved post now has a new tip.

errors.update_failed: Could not update the review. Please try again.

states.fetch_failed_desc: Please try again in a moment.
states.fetch_failed_tip: Open the page again to refresh the latest posts.
states.empty_desc: Be the first to share a beauty salon review.
states.empty_tip: Adding the salon name, treatment, booking flow, and service quality helps others decide faster.
states.no_results_desc: Try another keyword or a lighter filter.

category_hints.beauty_review: 💡 Include the salon name, treatment experience, booking and service flow, foreigner support, and revisit intent.
category_hints.food_review: 💡 Leave the menu, atmosphere, and wait time that fit before or after a beauty booking.
category_hints.travel_review: 💡 Focus on routes, photo points, and how easy it was to visit before or after treatment.
category_hints.meetup: 💡 Summarize the show time, ticket information, and why it is fun to go together.
category_hints.help: 💡 Explain your booking, visit, or service question as clearly as possible.

write_guide_title.beauty_review: Start with a beauty salon review
write_guide_title.food_review: Share a food spot that fits a beauty schedule
write_guide_title.travel_review: Share a sightseeing route that worked well before or after treatment
write_guide_title.meetup: Summarize the show or event briefly
write_guide_title.help: Ask a booking or visit question clearly

write_guide_body.beauty_review: The salon name, treatment experience, booking flow, service quality, foreigner support, and revisit intent help a lot before booking.
write_guide_body.food_review: Menu, atmosphere, and wait time make it easier to connect food reviews to a beauty day.
write_guide_body.travel_review: Photo points, travel time, and quick-stop reasons help the follow-up flow stay useful.
write_guide_body.meetup: Keep the show time, ticket details, and on-site mood short and clear.
write_guide_body.help: Describe your booking, service, or pre-visit question with enough detail to get a useful answer.

title_placeholder.beauty_review: e.g. Lash perm review at OO Beauty in Gangnam
title_placeholder.food_review: e.g. Brunch cafe that worked well after treatment
title_placeholder.travel_review: e.g. Seongsu walk I enjoyed before and after treatment
title_placeholder.meetup: e.g. Let us go to this weekend exhibition together
title_placeholder.help: e.g. Please recommend a salon with good foreigner support

point_placeholder.beauty_review: e.g. Fast booking replies and comfortable guidance for foreigners
point_placeholder.food_review: e.g. Short wait and a clean meal
point_placeholder.travel_review: e.g. Easy to visit within an hour before or after treatment
point_placeholder.meetup: e.g. More fun to see together than alone
point_placeholder.help: e.g. I want to know if English consultation is available

desc_placeholder.beauty_review: Describe the treatment, booking flow, service, satisfaction, foreigner support, and whether you would revisit.
desc_placeholder.food_review: Describe the menu, mood, wait time, and why it matched your beauty day well.
desc_placeholder.travel_review: Describe the route, photo spots, travel time, and why it worked well before or after treatment.
desc_placeholder.meetup: Describe the event and why you want to go together.
desc_placeholder.help: Describe your question and current situation clearly.

place_help.beauty_review: Adding the salon location makes the booking route easier to understand.
place_help.default: A map view is attached together.

form.meetup_toggle_desc: Receive interest signals from other people.
form.safety_item_1: • Do not share personal contact info right away. Check reactions in comments first.
form.safety_item_2: • We recommend arranging plans around public places.

image.label: Add images
image.title: You can upload up to {{count}} images.
image.file_only_alert: Only image files can be added.
image.limit_alert: You can upload up to {{count}} images.
image.preview_desc: Image {{index}}. Check the preview before posting.

guides.beauty_review: Share treatment results or the salon atmosphere if you can.
guides.food_review: Add food shots or a photo of the place if it helps.
guides.travel_review: Capture the mood of the place or a memorable point.
guides.meetup: Share the on-site atmosphere or why it would be fun together.
guides.help: Upload a reference image too if it helps explain.

draft_desc.active: Reactions are clustering around times and dates.
draft_desc.forming: A possible plan is starting to form.
draft_desc.preparing: People are still split on timing.

card.more_region: 📍 See other reviews and meetup posts in {{region}} →

freshness.realtime: 🔥 Reactions from travelers are coming in right now.
freshness.updated: ✨ The author added new tips after visiting.
freshness.active: 💬 People are still actively discussing this post.
freshness.calm: 🍃 It is calm now, but still useful to come back to anytime.

meetup_safety.title: 🛡️ Safe meetup guide
meetup_safety.item_1: Meet in public places such as cafes or restaurants.
meetup_safety.item_2: Talk enough in comments before sharing contact information.

related.title: ✨ Similar reviews
related.empty_line_1: There are no other reviews in this area yet.
related.empty_line_2: Why not leave the first related update?

author_panel.title: 📊 My post reaction report

guide.weekend: This weekend is getting the most reactions. Try suggesting a specific time.
guide.vote: Opinions are split. Offer a few date options and ask people to choose.
guide.share: People are starting to gather. Thank them and share the exact place once more.

draft.weekend: This weekend has the most interest. How does Saturday around 2 PM sound?
draft.vote: There are several options. Which works better this week, Saturday or Sunday?
draft.share: Thanks for the interest. I will share the exact location once more in the comments.

author_panel.final_draft: Everyone, shall we finalize who is going this weekend in the comments?
author_panel.footer: This is not a confirmed meetup yet. Please keep coordinating in the comments.

result.title: 📝 Wrap-up after closing / visiting
result.help: 💡 A short wrap-up helps the next person a lot. Even one useful tip keeps this post valuable longer.
result.placeholder: Did you actually go? Share how it went and what tip the next visitor should know.
result.tips_visited: If you visit next, be sure to check the author tips.
result.tips_retry: If plans changed, try opening the meetup again with a new schedule.

author_safety.title: 🛡️ Safety guide for authors
author_safety.item_1: For a first meetup, guide people to a public place such as a cafe or restaurant.
author_safety.item_2: Coordinate enough in public comments before sharing private contact information.
author_safety.item_3: If someone makes an uncomfortable request, use the report feature.

signal_summary.title: 📝 Tentative meetup draft
signal_summary.time_split: People are still split on timing, so more coordination is needed in comments.
signal_summary.time_focus: A shared plan to go here on {{time}} is starting to form.
signal_summary.time_flexible: Many reactions are still about coordinating the date, so the plan is flexible.
signal_summary.desc: There are {{count}} reactions from people who want to go together for {{topic}}.
signal_summary.notice_1: ⚠️ This is not a confirmed meetup yet.
signal_summary.notice_2: 🗨️ Do not share private contact information. Talk in comments first.
signal_summary.join_cta: Leave a signal for this draft

bottom_safety.title: 🛡️ Safe meetup promise
bottom_safety.item_1: Do not share private contact information right away. Coordinate enough in comments first.
bottom_safety.item_2: We recommend a first meetup in public places such as cafes or galleries.
bottom_safety.item_3: Firmly refuse requests for money or personal information.

signal_intents.interested: I would like to go too
signal_intents.join_if_schedule_fits: I will join if the time works
signal_intents.question: I have a question

interp.papago_desc: Open Naver Papago for quick translation and text support.
interp.google_desc: Open Google Translate when you need another quick translation option.

interpreter_page.title: 即時翻譯
interpreter_page.subtitle: 遊客語言自動設置為當前應用語言，商店語言固定為韓語。
interpreter_page.onboarding: 遊客輸入的內容將翻譯成韓語，店员輸入的韓語將翻譯成遊客的語言。
interpreter_page.customer_recording: 正在錄製遊客語音，再次點擊以結束
interpreter_page.staff_recording: 正在錄製店員語音，再次點擊以結束
interpreter_page.staff_placeholder: 請輸入店員說的韓語內容。
interpreter_page.voice_supported_hint: 通過語音按鈕錄音或直接在下方輸入文字。
interpreter_page.voice_not_supported_hint: 此瀏覽器不支援語音輸入。請使用文字輸入。
interpreter_page.voice_unrecognized_error: 無法識別語音。請說得更清晰一點。
interpreter_page.voice_failed_error: 語音識別失敗。您可以繼續使用文字輸入。
interpreter_page.recording_status: 正在錄音。最長可錄製 {{seconds}} 秒。
interpreter_page.mic_unsupported_error: 無法使用麥克風。請檢查權限或使用文字輸入。
interpreter_page.translation_failed_error: 翻譯失敗。請嘗試重新操作。
